data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Earnings Beat, Cash Hoard Swells; Spotlight On Warren Buffett Successor
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway has exceeded expectations with its earnings report, with a significant increase in profits. The conglomerate's upcoming annual meeting is expected to bring a major development, as Warren Buffett will not be taking the stage. The cash reserves of Berkshire Hathaway have also seen a notable increase. This has generated a spotlight on the search for Warren Buffett's successor within the company.

data.title: Broadcom, Viking, Rio Tinto Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points As Market Revs
data.description: Broadcom is at the forefront of a group of five stocks displaying encouraging indicators for buying. The group also features companies in the industrial sector, a mining company, and a high-potential data center stock. Apart from Broadcom, Viking and Rio Tinto stand out as leading stocks that are nearing buy points, indicating a positive trend in the market.

data.title: SRAD Investigation Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD) Investors to Contact the Firm
data.description: A prominent securities litigation law firm, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, based in RADNOR, Pennsylvania, announced on May 2, 2026, that they are initiating an investigation into Sportradar Group AG (Sportradar) for suspected breaches of the federal securities laws. Sportradar, listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker SRAD, is under scrutiny by the law firm for potential violations. The investigation is being conducted on behalf of undisclosed parties. Further details can be found on the law firm's website, www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Avelo Airlines Announces Discounted Fares to Support Spirit Airlines Customers - and Hiring Opportunities for Displaced Employees
data.description: A new option for air travel has been introduced by Avelo, providing alternatives for 29 routes that were previously serviced by Spirit Airlines. Avelo is offering a significant discount of 75% off base fares using the code TRYAVELO. This offer comes as part of their announcement made on May 2, 2026 in Houston. Additionally, the airline is also providing a status match service to ensure a smooth transition for passengers.

data.title: a16z supports CFTC over states banning prediction markets, affecting platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket, hindering user access.
data.description: According to a report from venture capital firm a16z, crackdowns by states on platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket potentially violate federal law and impede market access for regular users. The firm suggests that the efforts to regulate these platforms may prevent individuals from participating in markets and accessing opportunities on a wider scale. The report highlights the importance of considering federal regulations and ensuring that state actions do not restrict the ability of ordinary users to engage with these platforms.

data.title: Laird Superfood to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: Laird Superfood, Inc. (NYSE American: LSF) based in Boulder, Colorado, will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 14, 2026, after the market closes. A webcast will be hosted by management at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. The live webcast can be accessed on the Laird Superfood Investor Relations website at https://investors.lairdsuperfood.com/ under the “Events” section. Laird Superfood is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol LSF.

data.title: Allegiant Launches Special Offer to Passengers Affected by Closure of Spirit Airlines
data.description: Allegiant Airlines has unveiled a unique promotion where Spirit Airlines customers have the opportunity to receive half of their spent amount back as Allways Rewards® points on specific flights by using the code ALLWAYSTHERE* The offer is valid for a limited time. In a separate development, Allegiant (NASDAQ: ALGT) has declared a temporary fare freeze for routes that coincide with Spirit Airlines. This move aims to provide stability and competitive pricing for customers. The news was shared on May 2, 2026, in Las Vegas.

data.title: GAC's overseas export volume breaks through to new highs, surging 133.9% year-on-year from January to April, as its global expansion journey enters the fast lane
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on May 2, 2026, GAC has experienced significant growth in overseas sales, with an impressive 86% year-over-year (YoY) increase in the first quarter. The company's global expansion has been ramped up further, exporting 70,474 vehicles from January to April, marking a substantial 133.9% YoY rise. This growth is being driven by the implementation of the "One GAC 2.0" strategy, indicating a strategic push for company-wide development.

data.title: CHICKEN OF THE SEA BECOMES FIRST MAINSTREAM SEAFOOD BRAND IN THE U.S. TO COMMIT TO 100% MARINE STEWARDSHIP COUNCIL CERTIFICATION FOR ITS TUNA PRODUCTS
data.description: Chicken of the Sea, a prominent player in the canned seafood sector, is enhancing its sustainability initiatives by obtaining MSC Certification. The company, part of Thai Union Group, revealed on May 2, 2026, in Pittsburgh, that in observance of World Tuna Day, all Chicken of the Sea products will now bear this certification. This move underscores their commitment to responsible fishing practices.

data.title: One open-source agent framework turned $599 Mac mini into hottest AI hardware; now Apple can't produce enough.
data.description: The Mac mini, previously an overlooked $599 desktop, has transformed into a highly sought-after piece of AI hardware globally. This remarkable shift was powered by one cutting-edge open-source agent framework.

data.title: Sigenergy Releases 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report
data.description: Today, in Shanghai, on May 2, 2026, Sigenergy Technology Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 6656.HK) a renowned company specializing in AI-driven energy solutions, has released its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The report highlights the company's advancements in sustainable innovation, green manufacturing, and social responsibility.

data.title: Sass Magazine Releases May/June 2026 BOSS Issue Celebrating Women in Business Across Frederick County and Beyond
data.description: In Frederick, Maryland, on May 2, 2026, Sass Magazine unveiled its May/June 2026 BOSS Issue. This marks the 7th consecutive year the publication has dedicated an issue to women in business. The featured article in this edition highlights the journey of a successful entrepreneur who initially ventured into business with Equinox Dance Company, a small modern dance company.

data.title: New regulations under Trump offer tax breaks for cannabis companies, attracting investment to the growing industry.
data.description: The recent move by the administration to ease federal regulations on medical marijuana is offering substantial tax breaks to numerous cannabis companies. This change has the potential to attract significant investment into the growing sector.

data.title: Low-fare pioneer Spirit Airlines closes due to financial turmoil, declaring bankruptcy for the second time in two years.
data.description: Spirit Airlines, known for its significantly low fares, has faced financial difficulties, leading to its second bankruptcy in just two years. The airline has been grappling with ongoing challenges in the industry.

data.title: COREWELL HEALTH EAST TEAMSTERS TO PRACTICE PICKET AT WAYNE CAMPUS
data.description: 10,000 registered nurses, who are members of Teamsters Local 2024, are advocating for a fair initial contract at Corewell Health East in Detroit. To highlight their demands for safe working conditions, they will conduct a practice picket at the hospital's Wayne campus on Saturday, May 2 at 6 p.m.

data.title: Does Your Building Have Fire Sprinklers?
data.description: In an urgent announcement, Fast Guard Service has warned real estate owners and property managers about the upcoming 2026 fire code revisions to NFPA 25. These updates will bring substantial changes to sprinkler system compliance standards, with potential grave insurance consequences. The implications are particularly significant, highlighting the paramount importance for stakeholders to understand and prepare for these modifications. This advisory, released from SAN JOSE, Calif. on May 2, 2026, emphasizes the critical need for immediate action in response to the impending alterations.

data.title: $167.2M Q1 revenue for Riot Platforms; Data center arm brings in $33.2M, Bitcoin mining income drops.
data.description: Riot Platforms posted revenue of $167.2 million in the first quarter of 2026. The company's data center division brought in $33.2 million in revenue during this period. However, revenue from Bitcoin mining experienced a decline.
